text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly over 24 hours, with Ethereum's 2.9% decline outpacing Bitcoin's 2.1%, suggesting weakness is broad rather than concentrated in one major asset. The Fear & Greed Index at 22 (Extreme Fear) reflects elevated anxiety despite the relatively mild price moves, though the recent 13-point rise over seven days hints that panic may be starting to ease. At $84B in daily volume and Bitcoin dominance holding steady above 56%, the market appears to be consolidating rather than capitulating, with capital neither fleeing nor rushing to deploy aggressively.
